name: The Ultimate Despair
description:
Class 77 of Hope's Peak Academy (except for Chiaki Nanami, Ultimate Imposter and Anime Characters) as well as Junko Enoshima and Mukuro Ikusaba. These people are all responsible for The Tragedy, regarded as The Biggest, Most Awful, Most Tragic Event in Human History. They have been twisted into worse people by the hands of Junko Enoshima and her despair.

Characters from Danganronpa 2 Despair Arc, Goodbye Despair, and Future Arc
